response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network security, embedded switching, or hardware-level firmware development — all central to the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded contexts or Linux kernel work
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a hard requirement
No experience with network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X), switch hardware, or embedded firmware

key_factors.factor: No network security or switch firmware background
